heading: Imposition of tax
label: 641 Imposition of tax

children.text: income accumulated in trust for the benefit of unborn or unascertained persons or persons with contingent interests, and income accumulated or held for future distribution under the terms of the will or trust;
income which is to be distributed currently by the fiduciary to the beneficiaries, and income collected by a guardian of an infant which is to be held or distributed as the court may direct;
income received by estates of deceased persons during the period of administration or settlement of the estate; and
income which, in the discretion of the fiduciary, may be either distributed to the beneficiaries or accumulated.

children.heading: Computation and payment
children.label: b Computation and payment
children.text: The taxable income of an estate or trust shall be computed in the same manner as in the case of an individual, except as otherwise provided in this part. The tax shall be computed on such taxable income and shall be paid by the fiduciary. For purposes of this subsection, a foreign trust or foreign estate shall be treated as a nonresident alien individual who is not present in the United States at any time.

children.heading: Special rules for taxation of electing small business trusts
children.label: c Special rules for taxation of electing small business trusts
A
children.text: the portion of any electing small business trust which consists of stock in 1 or more S corporations shall be treated as a separate trust, and

children.label: B
children.text: the amount of the tax imposed by this chapter on such separate trust shall be determined with the modifications of paragraph (2).

children.label: A
children.text: Except as provided in section 1(h), the amount of the tax imposed by section 1(e) shall be determined by using the highest rate of tax set forth in section 1(e).

children.label: B
children.text: The exemption amount under section 55(d) shall be zero.

children.label: i
children.text: The items required to be taken into account under section 1366.

children.label: ii
children.text: Any gain or loss from the disposition of stock in an S corporation.

children.label: iii
children.text: To the extent provided in regulations, State or local income taxes or administrative expenses to the extent allocable to items described in clauses (i) and (ii).

children.label: iv
children.text: Any interest expense paid or accrued on indebtedness incurred to acquire stock in an S corporation.

children.label: D
children.text: No amount shall be allowed under paragraph (1) or (2) of section 1211(b).

children.label: i
children.text: Section 642(c) shall not apply.

children.label: ii
children.text: For purposes of section 170(b)(1)(G), adjusted gross income shall be computed in the same manner as in the case of an individual, except that the deductions for costs which are paid or incurred in connection with the administration of the trust and which would not have been incurred if the property were not held in such trust shall be treated as allowable in arriving at adjusted gross income.

children.heading: Treatment of remainder of trust and distributions
children.label: 3 Treatment of remainder of trust and distributions
A
children.text: the amount of the tax imposed by this chapter on the portion of any electing small business trust not treated as a separate trust under paragraph (1), and

children.label: B
children.text: the distributable net income of the entire trust,

children.heading: Treatment of unused deductions where termination of separate trust
children.label: 4 Treatment of unused deductions where termination of separate trust
children.text: If a portion of an electing small business trust ceases to be treated as a separate trust under paragraph (1), any carryover or excess deduction of the separate trust which is referred to in section 642(h) shall be taken into account by the entire trust.

children.heading: Electing small business trust
children.label: 5 Electing small business trust
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “electing small business trust” has the meaning given such term by section 1361(e)(1).
